name: Crockpot Porkchops with Mushroom Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the excess fat from the pork chops and use it to grease a large skillet.
2. Over high heat, brown each chop lightly on both sides.
3. Season with salt and pepper as it finishes cooking in the skillet.
4. Place the seasoned chops into the crockpot.
5. Add sage to the chops.
6. In the same skillet, combine undiluted soup and onion flakes.
7. Scrape pan juices into the cooker.
8. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours.
